description_long: This is a modern, high-caliber sniper rifle featuring a long, heavy barrel and a robust, tactical design. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, providing precision aiming for long-range engagements. Its stock is adjustable and skeletonized, with a cheek rest and a rear monopod for stability, while the front end is supported by a bipod for steady shooting. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the rifle includes a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic and polymer components visible throughout the structure. The muzzle appears to have a brake or compensator device, enhancing control during firing.
description: A modern, matte black sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, adjustable skeletonized stock, bipod, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bipod, adjustable stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, bipod legs, and the alignment of the scope and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the scope, stock, and bipod.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
